reclassified_2026_07_21: Downgraded from PREREGISTERED after the Codex reconciliation review. This is a design sketch, NOT an executable preregistration: the unresolved-order margin, the risk grid, the exact fresh roots, and the numeric-threshold justifications are still undefined/placeholder. It carries NO authority to open seeds. It may only be executed after (a) the frozen Q-R1 successor confirmatory closes, (b) a learner-blind sensitivity screen over the EXISTING Garrido risks R11/R14/R21/R22/R24 shows them decision-inert, and (c) written Garrido physical validation of any product-coupling with amplitudes/frequencies/timing/persistence/grid/adjacency frozen.
motivation: Gate 2 closed the neural premium in the STATIONARY env on both carriers (STOP_NO_DEPLOYABLE_NEURAL_PREMIUM_STATIONARY_ENV): the product-mix decision is belief-insensitive, so retained knowledge cannot convert to a decision change. This is the ONLY authorized new mechanism: a product-COUPLED risk that breaks that symmetry, making the optimal mix depend on which product will be hit/surge, so retained cross-campaign risk-type knowledge can convert. Prior product-BLIND risk escalation already closed (max H_profile_safe 6.9e-05, optimal posture invariant across 45 profiles); this is the untested product-COUPLED variant.

mechanism_candidates_researcher_defined.R24_product_composition: the Garrido demand-surge risk with a PERSISTENT per-campaign product composition (surge favors P_C or P_H), observable only through history
mechanism_candidates_researcher_defined.R14_product_specific_yield: the Garrido rework/non-conforming risk applied asymmetrically to one product's Op7 yield
mechanism_candidates_researcher_defined.note: Garrido-native risk families (R24, R14); the product-coupling is the researcher-defined extension, disclosed as a doctrine-grounded assumption, NOT attributed to Garrido's exact levels

selection_axis_learner_blind: H_PI clairvoyant headroom (oracle-of-risk vs best static)
ranking reversals (does the argmax action CHANGE with the risk state? the belief-sensitivity the stationary env lacked)
observable classical conversion H_obs (retained-Bayesian-on-risk-type MPC captures H_PI)
connected region (>=3 graph-adjacent risk cells all passing)
selection_forbidden: risk frequency/impact/coupling/timing may NEVER be chosen by learner return; only by the learner-blind axis above

screen_gates.unresolved_margin: domain-justified, frozen before seeds (NOT the accidental <=0-per-pair rule)

comparator: the frozen MPC* (contracts/mpc_star_frozen_v1.json), extended to consume the retained risk-type posterior; a learner is authorized ONLY if a deployable candidate leaves LCB95(residual over retained MPC*) >= 0.015 with ranking reversals and safety

execution.seeds: fresh collision-scanned block, frozen before opening; burned 7570801-24 NEVER reused for a confirmatory claim

stop_verdicts.STOP_R24_PRODUCT_CARRIER_NO_CONVERTIBLE_: R24 product composition does not create belief-sensitive convertible headroom
stop_verdicts.GO_LEARNER_ON_<cell>: a connected region passes all screen gates learner-blind; a single hybrid confidence-gated learner (M3/M4, the existing ~70%-built ConfidenceGatedBeliefValueMPC) is then authorized on fresh seeds vs MPC*

honest_prior: Given the stationary-env closure and the extensive prior product-blind risk null, the prior on a convertible product-coupled door is modest; the screen is designed to close it cheaply (learner-blind, no PPO) OR open exactly one learner attempt. Either outcome is a terminal result.
